evals.prompt: My MEMORY.md is 226 lines and content is getting cut off. Can you fix it?
expectations: Should measure current MEMORY.md line count
Should audit all topic files in memory directory
Should identify inline content that belongs in topic files
Should present a refactoring plan before executing

evals.prompt: Clean up my memory files, there's a lot of stale stuff in there
expectations: Should check dates in each memory file for staleness
Should identify project-type memories older than 60 days
Should NOT archive feedback or user type memories based on age alone
Should propose archiving stale items to archive/ subdirectory, not deleting

evals.prompt: Refactor my CLAUDE.md, it's getting too long
Remember that I prefer dark mode in all my applications
Run a memory audit and tell me what's duplicated between MEMORY.md and CLAUDE.md
expectations: Should cross-reference MEMORY.md content against CLAUDE.md
Should identify and flag duplicate content
Should recommend removing duplicates from memory (keeping in CLAUDE.md/rules)
